case_title: COSME TRUJILLO VS. JOEL EDWARD DICKINSON JR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAR-26-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DICKINSON JR, JOEL EDWARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRUJILLO, COSME RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DICKINSON JR, JOEL EDWARD $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY TRUJILLO, COSME AS TO DEFENDANT DICKINSON JR, JOEL EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY 16,2011 - NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT, MATTER WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2011 - JUDGMENT.
